page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.s2.large is an x86_64 architecture virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 2 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 2 physical cores, resulting in 1.0 thread per core. The instance is equipped with 4.0 GB of system memory, providing a memory-to-core ratio of 2.0 GB per core.

This instance type does not include any local NVMe or SSD storage, requiring external block storage volumes for the operating system and data. It does not feature any GPU hardware accelerators or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. Additionally, the CPU lacks advanced instruction set extensions, with flags for AVX, AVX-512, AMX, AES cryptography, and virtualization extensions marked as unavailable.

Given its dedicated CPU allocation but modest resource profile, the ecs.s2.large offers an entry-level compute-to-RAM ratio of 1:2. This makes it a qualitatively cost-efficient option for lightweight, non-burstable workloads that require dedicated CPU execution without the overhead of shared-core resource contention. Suitable workloads include lightweight web serving, small-scale proxy servers, basic utility scripts, and development environments that do not rely on heavy cryptographic or vector processing instructions.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.s2.large is an entry-level x86_64 virtual server featuring 2 dedicated vCPUs across 2 physical cores with 1.0 thread per core. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, it provides 4.0 GB of system memory, yielding a 2.0 GB per core ratio. This instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, requiring network-attached storage for deployment. Hardware-level instruction extensions such as AVX, AVX-512, AMX, and AES are not available on this platform. With its dedicated CPU allocation and modest resource footprint, the ecs.s2.large is qualitatively positioned as a cost-efficient option for lightweight, steady-state workloads. It is best suited for basic web serving, utility applications, and development environments that do not demand advanced vector processing or high memory density.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.s2.large is an x86_64 server with 2 dedicated vCPUs, 4.0 GB RAM, and no local storage. It runs on KVM and is designed for lightweight, steady-state workloads.

tagline: A dedicated dual-core virtual server with a balanced compute-to-memory profile for lightweight, steady-state utility workloads.
